name: Potluck Chicken Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over medium heat, sauté mushrooms, onion, and garlic in 3 tablespoons butter until tender.
2. Stir in flour until thoroughly combined.
3. Gradually add milk; bring to a boil.
4. Cook and stir for 2 minutes or until thickened and bubbly. Remove from heat.
5. Stir in mayonnaise until smooth.
6. Add chicken, rice, celery, peas, pimientos, lemon juice, salt, and pepper; mix well.
7. Spoon into an ungreased 12x9x2-inch baking dish.
8. Melt remaining butter; toss with cornflakes.
9. Sprinkle over casserole.
10. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until bubbly.
